title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence and its devastating impact on public spaces and community safety in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's growing importance as a hub for advanced manufacturing and polymer technology innovation.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South Under Investigation
summary: CMPD is investigating a fatal collision that occurred on I-85 South near Little Rock Road early Saturday morning.
charlotte_impact: Addresses traffic safety concerns and the potential need for infrastructure improvements on major roadways.

title: Dry Weekend Precedes Rainy Monday
summary: Charlotte will experience a mainly dry weekend before a cold front brings rain and cooler temperatures on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather forecast impacting weekend activities and preparations for the upcoming week.

title: Competency Hearing Scheduled in Zarutska Murder Case
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska, will undergo a competency hearing.
charlotte_impact: Follows a high-profile murder case, raising questions about mental health and the justice system.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at the Arbor Smoke Shop in north Charlotte; a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Addresses sexual assault and safety concerns within local businesses and the broader community.

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion Impact
summary: Former Mayor Anthony Foxx calls for a reassessment of the I-77 toll lane expansion's impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Highlights concerns about equitable infrastructure development and its potential effects on marginalized communities.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal on Friday after rejecting the superintendent's initial $2.1 billion plan.
charlotte_impact: Concerns the allocation of resources for public education and the priorities of the Charlotte-Mecklenburg School system.

title: Water Leak Near School Unfixed Amid Drought
summary: Charlotte Water allowed a leak near a school to persist for almost a year, despite facing mandatory water restrictions.
charlotte_impact: Exposes infrastructure failures and mismanagement of water resources during a critical drought period.

title: 73-Year-Old Woman Accused of Killing Husband
summary: Patty Griffin, 73, has been charged with second-degree murder in Union County for allegedly killing her husband.
charlotte_impact: Reports on domestic violence and the circumstances surrounding a homicide within a family.

title: Man Convicted in Brooks Sandwich House Shooting Convicted of 3 More Murders
summary: Steven Staples, previously tied to the deadly Brooks Sandwich House shooting, has been convicted of three additional murders.
charlotte_impact: Details the prosecution of a serial murderer and the impact on multiple victims and their families.

title: Appeals Court Upholds Conviction of Madalina Cojocari's Stepfather
summary: The appeals court upheld the conviction of Christopher Palmiter, Madalina Cojocari's stepfather, rejecting his claims.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on a case involving child endangerment and the legal proceedings following the initial conviction.

title: Truist Championship Generates $125M Economic Impact
summary: The Truist Championship at Quail Hollow has generated a $125 million economic impact for North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the economic benefits of major sporting events and their contribution to the state's economy.

title: NTSB Releases Report on Deadly Mooresville Tanker Explosion
summary: The NTSB released a preliminary report on the Mooresville tanker explosion that killed the truck driver and injured another.
charlotte_impact: Investigates the causes of industrial accidents and the safety protocols surrounding hazardous materials transportation.

title: Water Restrictions Implemented Across Charlotte Area
summary: Due to exceptional drought conditions, communities across the Charlotte area are implementing mandatory water restrictions.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the severity of the drought and the necessary measures to conserve water resources in the region.
